text: This is my college project for our
Course, but by far it wasn't my first encounter with
all the way back in 2019 at the end of my middle-school years.
I chose this project because it is a larger project that has the various concepts I learnt from OOP in a well defined structure with a UML, a build tool, and unit tests using

This is also a team project, and I was the leader of 4 other computer engineers with me in the group. I acted as a project manager/designer and also helped my teammates with debugging, troubleshooting and implementation of the algorithms.
I know the GUI is not very impressive but it was made with
in a single day, by me. Including all the validation checks and error messages (there were a lot).
